James.text: According to James 1:19, what should be the first response of a person?
options: Be quick to listen, slow to speak, slow to anger
James.correct: Be quick to listen, slow to speak, slow to anger

options: A spring that yields bitter water

Joshua.correct: God will be with them wherever they go

Joshua.text: How did the Israelites divide the Jordan River when entering Canaan?
Who tricked Joshua into making a treaty with them by pretending to come from a distant land?

options: As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord.
Choose this day whom you will serve.
Joshua.correct: As for me and my house, we will serve the Lord.

Joshua.correct: Reading the Book of the Law continually and obeying it
